chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2307 of 2022 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ For orders as to maintainability of petition 17.01.2025 Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General On the last date the following order was passed: “There are questions regarding maintainability of the petition as apparently not only sales tax registration of the petitioner was cancelled/suspended but in addition to it pursuant to a show-cause notice petitioner was black listed and judgment of the Tribunal has been passed in respect thereof, however, there is no challenge to the said judgment of the tribunal in this petition. Counsel to assist on the next date failing whereof this petition shall be dismissed for non-prosecution. Adjourned” Today petitioner is unrepresented without intimation or justification, however, perusal of the file demonstrates that petition is misconceived as appellate recourse remained available to the petitioner. Petition is dismissed. Judge Judge Amjad
